harness.js:15:2-23:5
> exec(("git blame " + filename), {cwd: dirname}, function(error, stdout, stderr) {
  if ((error !== null)) {
    console["log"](("exec error: " + error));
    return cb(new Error(error));
  }
  var lines = stdout["split"]("
");
  lines["unshift"]("");
  cb(null, lines);
});
